severity_justification: Product images fail to load on poor networks (2G/3G), degrading UI but not blocking purchases — a workaround (text + price visible) exists. Similar historical bug: FLIPPI-2143 (P0) — "SLAP || Broken image thumbnails in User Review section" (sim=0.29).
owner_reason: Assigned to Aaryak Sanghoi on 1/2 most-similar past bugs (similarity ≥ 0.12).
